title: Warning message for time tracking when attempting to pause/stop a time tracking session another user started
excerpt: Warning message for time tracking when a user tries to pause/stop time tracking that another user started… for example, “You’re about to pause a time tracking session you didn’t start. Are you sure you want to pause it?” …

posts.author: katherine (Katherine Lu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Warning message for time tracking when a user tries to pause/stop time tracking that another user started… for example, “You’re about to pause a time tracking session you didn’t start. Are you sure you want to pause it?”

I’ve had a user accidentally pausing another user’s time tracking session and they had to contact the other user to let them know… “oops, I stopped your timer… can you restart it?”
